daily_scan
City to close Hover Street/CO 119 intersection for roof work: The city will temporarily shut down the intersection of Hover Street and CO 119 on June 28 for a library roof contract vote. This affects local traffic patterns and public access. Editor context: This is a current traffic impact with potential travel disruption. Suggested treatment: story. Newsworthiness: 13/20 (immediacy 5, impact 4, conflict 1, novelty 3). Why now: A temporary intersection closure for construction is scheduled this month. Beat memory: similar topic 'Library Intersection Closure Scheduled' was first seen 2026-06-30T12:43:42.986306500+00:00, last seen 2026-06-30T12:43:42.986306500+00:00, and has appeared 1 previous time(s). Treat this as recurring/background unless the source shows a new vote, deadline, dollar amount, filing, outage, meeting item, or public impact. Suggested next step: Verify the exact closure dates and times, affected roads, and any detour routes before drafting. What would make this publishable: The exact dates, times, affected roads, detour routes, and any public safety concerns. Compare against beat memory before drafting; write
